mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sell_info ( id, pid, source, goods, unit, price, nums, discount, dsc, total, tax, tat, tpt, attr, warehouse, batch, mfd, serial, data, retreat ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.pid}, #{item.source}, #{item.goods}, #{item.unit}, #{item.price}, #{item.nums}, #{item.discount}, #{item.dsc}, #{item.total}, #{item.tax}, #{item.tat}, #{item.tpt}, #{item.attr}, #{item.warehouse}, #{item.batch}, #{item.mfd}, #{item.serial}, #{item.data}, #{item.retreat} )
